title: Objects, Scope, Linkage, Storage Duration, and Lifetime · Memory Trace: Lifetime Begin End
summary: An embedded controller caches addresses across callbacks while automatic, static, thread, and allocated objects begin and end at different times. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem lifetime begin end increment in object lifetime and address ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify precisely when each object lifetime begins and ends, including allocated storage and subobjects.
Map scope, linkage, and storage duration independently for block, file, static, thread, and allocated objects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
